items.title: Sophie Cunningham brings her voice — and positivity — to USA Sports’ WNBA coverage
items.body_excerpt: Sophie Cunningham is constantly talking — on and off the court. (Photo: Ryan May/800 Meter) Sophie Cunningham is never at a loss for words. Her joy for life and love of basketball shine through in every interview. She doesn’t mind telling it like it is, sharing exactly what’s on…
